_comment: Curated model lists for DocAnalyser. Updated by developer, pulled by app on startup via pricing_updater.py. Three models per provider: premium (most capable), balanced (everyday), fast (fast & cheap). xAI and DeepSeek have only two tiers. Ordered premium → balanced → fast within each provider.

Ollama (Local): (Run Local AI Setup to download models)
Lumo (Proton): (Web interface only — use Run → Via Web)
Duck.ai: (Web interface only — use Run → Via Web)
Mistral Le Chat: (Web interface only — use Run → Via Web)
